metadata.purpose: Warehouse-style lookup app for Advaning OMS inventory data.
metadata.source_rule: master_lookup is the frontend canonical sheet. Product_Lookup is ignored. oms_inventory_master, Sheet10, and legacy are used as database/reference sources for enrichment and missing-SKU recovery.
metadata.classification_rule: Awnings are controlled by app_config.awning_classifications. Other warehouse sections filter the same records.
metadata.relationship_rule: Series/class codes from masterlist create parent-child reference links from series groups to awnings, parts, fabrics, and accessories.
